Package org.jlab.epsci.ersap.base

Class ErsapUtil

java.lang.Object
org.jlab.epsci.ersap.base.ErsapUtil
@ParametersAreNonnullByDefault public final class ErsapUtil extends Object
Extra helper methods for ERSAP orchestrator and services.

  • Field Details

    • CANONICAL_NAME_PATTERN

      public static final Pattern CANONICAL_NAME_PATTERN
      Regex to validate a full canonical name. Groups are used to separate each component.

      A canonical name should have any of the following structures: 

       <host>%<port>_<language>
 <host>%<port>_<language>:<container>
 <host>%<port>_<language>:<container>:<engine>

 With %<port> part being optional.

  • Method Details

    • isCanonicalName

      public static boolean isCanonicalName(String name)
      Checks if the given name is a proper ERSAP canonical name.

      A canonical name should have any of the following structures: 

       <host>%<port>_<language>
 <host>%<port>_<language>:<container>
 <host>%<port>_<language>:<container>:<engine>
      Parameters:
      name - the name to be checked
      Returns:
      true if the string is a ERSAP canonical name, false if not

    • isDpeName

      public static boolean isDpeName(String name)
      Checks if the given name is a proper DPE canonical name.

      A DPE canonical name should have the following structure: 

       <host>_<language>
      Parameters:
      name - the name to be checked
      Returns:
      true if the string is a DPE canonical name, false if not

    • isContainerName

      public static boolean isContainerName(String name)
      Checks if the given name is a proper container canonical name.

      A container canonical name should have the following structure: 

       <host>_<language>:<container>
      Parameters:
      name - the name to be checked
      Returns:
      true if the string is a container canonical name, false if not

    • isServiceName

      public static boolean isServiceName(String name)
      Checks if the given name is a proper service canonical name.

      A service canonical name should have the following structure: 

       <host>_<language>:<container>:<engine>
      Parameters:
      name - the name to be checked
      Returns:
      true if the string is a service canonical name, false if not

    • getDpeName

      public static String getDpeName(String canonicalName)
      Gets the DPE name from the given ERSAP canonical name.
      Parameters:
      canonicalName - a ERSAP canonical name
      Returns:
      the DPE name

    • getContainerName

      public static String getContainerName(String canonicalName)
      Gets the container name from the given ERSAP canonical name. This returns just the container name part, without the DPE name (i.e. not a container canonical name).
      Parameters:
      canonicalName - a ERSAP canonical name with a container part
      Returns:
      the container name

    • getContainerCanonicalName

      public static String getContainerCanonicalName(String canonicalName)
      Gets the container canonical name from the given ERSAP canonical name. This returns the full canonical name, including the DPE name.
      Parameters:
      canonicalName - a ERSAP canonical name with a container part
      Returns:
      the container canonical name

    • getEngineName

      public static String getEngineName(String canonicalName)
      Gets the service engine name from the given ERSAP canonical name. This returns just the engine name part, without the container and DPE names (i.e. not a service canonical name).
      Parameters:
      canonicalName - a service canonical name
      Returns:
      the container name

    • getDpeHost

      public static String getDpeHost(String canonicalName)
      Gets the DPE host address from the given ERSAP canonical name.
      Parameters:
      canonicalName - a ERSAP canonical name
      Returns:
      the DPE host address

    • getDpePort

      public static int getDpePort(String canonicalName)
      Gets the DPE port from the given ERSAP canonical name.
      Parameters:
      canonicalName - a ERSAP canonical name
      Returns:
      the DPE port or the default port if not set in the name

    • getDpeLang

      public static String getDpeLang(String canonicalName)
      Gets the DPE language from the given ERSAP canonical name.
      Parameters:
      canonicalName - a ERSAP canonical name
      Returns:
      the DPE language

    • getDefaultPort

      public static int getDefaultPort(ErsapLang lang)
      Gets the default DPE port for the given language.
      Parameters:
      lang - the given ERSAP language
      Returns:
      the default port for a DPE of the language

    • getDefaultPort

      public static int getDefaultPort(String lang)
      Gets the default DPE port for the given language.
      Parameters:
      lang - a supported ERSAP language
      Returns:
      the default port for a DPE of the given language

    • buildDataTypes

      public static Set<EngineDataType> buildDataTypes(EngineDataType... dataTypes)
      Helps creating a set of engine data types.
      Parameters:
      dataTypes - all the data types
      Returns:
      a set with the data types

    • splitIntoLines

      public static String splitIntoLines(String input, String linePrefix, int maxLineLength)
      Splits the input string into lines of the given maximum length. Each line will be prefixed with the specified string.
      Parameters:
      input - the long string to split into lines
      linePrefix - the string to put before each line
      maxLineLength - the maximum line length, including the prefix
      Returns:
      the text split into lines

    • reportException

      public static String reportException(Throwable e)
      Returns the stack trace of a exception as a string.
      Parameters:
      e - an exception
      Returns:
      a string with the stack trace of the exception

    • getThrowableList

      public static List<Throwable> getThrowableList(Throwable throwable)
      Returns the list of Throwable objects in the exception chain.

      A throwable without cause will return a list containing one element: the input throwable. A throwable with one cause will return a list containing two elements: the input throwable and the cause throwable. A null throwable will return an empty list.

      Parameters:
      throwable - the throwable to inspect, may be null
      Returns:
      the list of throwables

    • getRootCause

      public static Throwable getRootCause(Throwable throwable)
      Obtains the root cause of the given the Throwable, if any.
      Parameters:
      throwable - the throwable to get the root cause for, may be null
      Returns:
      the root cause of the Throwable, null if none found or null throwable input

    • stack2str

      public static String stack2str(Exception e)
      Converts exception stack trace to a string.
      Parameters:
      e - exception
      Returns:
      String of the stack trace

    • isRemoteService

      public static Boolean isRemoteService(String serviceName)
      Checks to see if the service is locally deployed.
      Parameters:
      serviceName - service canonical name (dpe-ip:container:engine)
      Returns:
      true/false

    • localhost

      public static String localhost()
      Gets the IPv4 value for the localhost address.
      Returns:
      the localhost IP

    • getCurrentTime

      public static String getCurrentTime()
      Gets the current time and returns string representation of it.
      Returns:
      string representing the current time.

    • sleep

      public static void sleep(long millis)
      Causes the currently executing thread to sleep for the given number of milliseconds.

      If any thread interrupts the current thread, this method will return and the interrupt status will be set.

      Parameters:
      millis - the length of time to sleep in milliseconds

    • sleep

      public static void sleep(long duration, TimeUnit unit)
      Causes the currently executing thread to sleep for the given duration of time.

      If any thread interrupts the current thread, this method will return and the interrupt status will be set.

      Parameters:
      duration - the length of time to sleep
      unit - the time unit for the duration of the sleep
